data.acceptance:
1. Copilot can run claimed-step and take-loop sessions in interactive mode through the shared session runtime.
2. Copilot turn completion and session completion are detected from explicit protocol signals and normalized into the shared event model.
3. Follow-up prompting, timeout/kill, retry, and abort behavior match the shared protocol rather than bespoke Copilot logic.
4. Tests cover successful completion, hang timeout, and retry/abort behavior for interactive Copilot sessions.
